note: Iron fill(64,0) allocates heap-resident int64_t arrays for DFS stacks vs C int stack_node[64]/stack_depth[64] on stack (int32, no heap alloc). Language-design-inherent: Iron Int=int64_t, fill() heap-allocates. Stable observed ratio 1.2-1.5x; threshold set to 1.8x (+20% margin on 1.5x worst-case including full-suite noise).
